notes.note: Etruscan town on the southern road into Cisalpine Gaul; site of the triumvirs' summit conference of April 56 BC.

Ordo: the senatorial order, in which Cicero (as ex-consul) held the highest seniority. Castronius, as a knight, ``respects no one of our order more diligently'' than Cicero — the standard formula of senatorial-equestrian deference.
